resources.string: No saved services yet. Tap ★ on any service to save it.
No services found. Try a different keyword.
Unofficial aggregator. Data sourced from official UP / Govt of India websites. We never charge fees or store your credentials. Always verify URLs and never share OTPs.

UP Sewa Hub brings every Uttar Pradesh government service into one easy app — land records, certificates, court status, ration card, transport, grievances and more. Tap a service to open it inside the app with a cleaner interface.
Built for citizens, lawyers, property agents and anyone tired of jumping between dozens of UP govt sites.
